channel.title: Chemical Product and Process Modeling
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Chemical Product and Process Modeling

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Cogeneration system’s energy performance improvement by using P-graph and advanced process control
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0071

item.title: Numerical simulation of R134a evaporation in a cold water production system
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0095

item.title: Implementing a radial basis function model to anticipate the outcomes of the gasification
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0085

item.title: Sensitivity analysis and optimization of the whole process of continuous catalytic reforming for Persian gulf star oil company using an optimized data-driven model with tuned parameters
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0112

item.title: Evaluating the therapeutic potential of 4-hydroxyflavanes diastereomers derivatives against (MetAP2) for anti-cancer therapy: a molecular docking study
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0098

item.title: Enhanced cryogenic distillation column identification for methane separation: a hybrid artificial neural network approach
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0075

item.title: Natural Gas and hydrogen blending: a perspective on numerical modeling and CFD analysis for transient and steady-state scenarios
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0066

item.title: Simulation and optimization of Venturi type bubble generator to improve cavitation
item.description: Article by Salehe Allami, Ebrahim Nemati Lay, Minou Atharifar, Amirhossein Oudi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0120
